theme: Dark Theme (Midnight & Gold) + Light Theme (Ash & Gold)
emotional_archetype: Luxury (Premium, Depth, Mystery) blended with Organic & Earthy (Calm). Should feel reverent, peaceful, enlightening, and trustworthy. Avoid standard SaaS aesthetics.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Ensure H1 uses Cormorant Garamond. Use font-light for elegance or font-medium for legibility. Body text in Manrope must have loose line height (leading-relaxed) for reading long verses or sermons.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black. Use the Soft Gold sparingly as an accent for active states, primary buttons, and icons. Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.

surfaces_and_visuals.glassmorphism: Use 'Crystal Glass' for headers, bottom nav, and floating cards. Dark mode: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10. Light mode: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5.
surfaces_and_visuals.borders: 1px delicate inner stroke is MANDATORY to separate glass from background.
surfaces_and_visuals.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows. No harsh drop shadows. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]

grids_and_layouts.mobile_first: App must be designed mobile-first. Wrap main app in a container like max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden if viewed on desktop, to simulate mobile app feel.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 inside cards. Use gap-6 or gap-8 between major sections.
grids_and_layouts.tools_grid: Bento Grid Mode: grid-cols-2 gap-4 for the 8 AI tools. Cards should have a consistent height, icons aligned top-left.
grids_and_layouts.navigation: Bottom Navigation Bar for mobile: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 glassmorphism. Include Home, Study (Tools), Prayer, Profile.

components_strategy.cards: Use raw div/section with Tailwind for layout cards to achieve the glass look. Avoid rigid Shadcn Card if it restricts the aesthetic.
components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary: Gold background, dark text, hover:brightness-110. Secondary: Glass background, white text, subtle gold border.
components_strategy.forms_inputs: Use Shadcn Input/Select but HEAVILY CUSTOMIZE to remove 'Vercel-look'. Make inputs rounded-xl, bg-white/5, border-white/10, focus:border-[#D4AF37].
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react with strokeWidth={1.5} for an elegant, non-chunky look.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion in .js/.jsx files: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Tap states on cards and buttons: whileTap={{ scale: 0.98 }}.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Must explicitly set text color on hover. hover:bg-white/10 for glass cards.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: Serene breathing/pulsing effect. Avoid fast spinning circles. Use a soft glowing pulse.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has a heavy gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent).
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='tool-card-verse-lookup').

media_and_images.rules: Use beautiful, serene imagery for Verse of the Day or Hero sections. Ensure overlays are dark enough. Never use placeholder URLs.

image_urls.description: Peaceful mountain sunset landscape. Use for Verse of the Day background or Home Hero.
Dimly lit open Bible vintage aesthetic. Use for Daily Devotional or Sermon Architect header.
Calm water reflection sunrise. Use for Mood/Spirit Check-in or Prayer Hub background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Dark Theme by default using the deep midnight and soft gold palette.
DO NOT center align the app container. Preserve left-alignment for readable texts, especially long Bible verses.
Never use universal transitions (transition: all). Use specific transitions like transition-colors or transition-transform.
Use sonner for toasts, customized with glassmorphism to match the app.
Install and use lucide-react for icons.
Ensure all 8 AI tools are visually distinct but unified under the Bento grid layout on the Study/Tools page.
Include a 'Back' button in the header of sub-pages for Navigation History.
DO NOT use a fully transparent background for the bottom navigation or sticky headers. Always use a blur and slight color tint.
IMPORTANT: Provide code for .js and .jsx files, not .tsx. Do not use TypeScript syntax.
